.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven-specific build artifacts and wrapper files to the gitignore list.
.gitignore.after:
target/
pom.xml.tag
pom.xml.releaseBackup
pom.xml.versionsBackup
pom.xml.next
release.properties
dependency-reduced-pom.xml
buildNumber.properties
.mvn/timing.properties
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.jar

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.x to support Jakarta EE and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* packages, causing compilation failures or runtime incompatibilities with Jakarta EE 9+ APIs required by Spring Boot 3.
Spring Boot 3 requires Java 17 as a minimum; setting it to 21 ensures the project compiles and runs on the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Shiro Spring Boot Starter with manual Shiro dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old shiro-spring-boot-starter (1.8.0) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE). Shiro 2.0.6 provides Jakarta-compatible artifacts, but the auto-configuration starter is deprecated/removed in favor of manual configuration or specific integration modules.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JJWT library to 0.13.0 with modular dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JJWT versions may not be compatible with the new Spring Boot 3 classpath or require explicit modular dependencies (api, impl, jackson) for proper runtime resolution in the new environment.
Spring Boot 3 manages commons-lang3 transitively or it is no longer needed explicitly, avoiding version conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency.

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Migrate JPA and Validation annotations from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.why_exists: javax.persistence and javax.validation packages are removed in Java EE/Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors.

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Replace Lombok @Data annotation with explicit @Getter and @Setter annotations.
Remove redundant @EqualsAndHashCode annotation since @Data (or @Getter/@Setter) already handles equality.
Add a new 'permissions' field to the GroupRole entity.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.why_exists: javax.persistence package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.why_exists: javax.validation package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Remove Hibernate-specific GenericGenerator annotation and strategy configuration.
Update column definition for ID to explicitly set updatable and nullable constraints.
Change entity table name from 'user' to 'app_user' to avoid SQL reserved keyword conflicts.
Replace Lombok @Data and @EqualsAndHashCode with explicit @Builder, @Getter, and @Setter annotations.
Change cascade type from ALL to MERGE for ManyToMany relationship to prevent unintended deletion or persistence of associated entities.
Replace custom JPQL queries for username lookup with Spring Data JPA derived query methods.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.before:
@Query("SELECT DISTINCT u FROM user u WHERE u.username = :username")
Optional<User> findByUsername(@Param("username") String username);

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Replace custom JPQL query for active username lookup with Spring Data JPA derived query method.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.before:
@Query("SELECT u FROM user u WHERE u.username = :username AND u.enabled = true")
Optional<User> findActiveByUsername(@Param("username") String username);

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Remove unused email-based repository methods and their associated imports.
Remove unused Spring Data JPA annotation imports.
Remove unused java.util.List import.
Add import for GroupRole entity to support new method return type.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class GroupRole

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Rename parameter from usernameValue to username for clarity.
Add save method to the UserService interface.
Add getUsers method to the UserService interface.
Add getById method to the UserService interface.
Add getGroupRoleByCode method to the UserService interface.
Remove dependency on Apache Commons Lang3 for string manipulation.
Remove unused import for Instant.
Add import for GroupRole entity.
Add import for GroupRoleRepository.
Add import for UUID.
Inject GroupRoleRepository into UserServiceImpl.
Simplify getUserByUsername to use a specific repository method instead of manual string trimming and conditional logic.
Implement getById method to find user by UUID.
Implement getGroupRoleByCode method to find group role by code.
Implement getUsers method to retrieve all users.
Implement save method to persist a user.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot application name configuration.
Remove explicit Hibernate dialect configuration in favor of auto-detection.
Change Hibernate DDL auto strategy from create-drop to update.
Rename datasource driver property to match Spring Boot 3 kebab-case convention.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires kebab-case property names; camelCase driverClassName is no longer bound correctly.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Update database URL to point to a different database name.
